tagged_types.name: SPI_record
tagged_types.code: type SPI_record is abstract tagged limited null record;

documentation.description: Write a byte to the SPI

access_types.name: SPI_ptr
access_types.code: type SPI_ptr is access all SPI_record'Class;

documentation.description: Write a byte to the SPI
Read a buffer from the SPI

subprograms.name: get
subprograms.code: procedure get(self : SPI_record; value : out buffer; size : buff_index)

subprograms.name: set
subprograms.code: procedure set(self : SPI_record; value : buffer; size : buff_index)

documentation.description: Read a byte from the SPI
Write a buffer to the SPI
